# OS Compatibility

This is the public OS-only StackKits support projection. Future positive rows will
be derived from versioned support policy and current `HostConformanceReceipt` evidence; host,
runtime, provider, device, and virtualization diagnostics are not support dimensions.

- StackKits version: `unreleased`
- Generated: 2026-07-18T00:00:00Z

Positive grades remain disabled until the controlled receipt projector exists.

| OS family | Distribution | Version | Grade | Reason |
| --- | --- | --- | :-: | --- |
| linux | debian | `12` | **⚪ unverified** | OS policy not yet admitted |
| linux | ubuntu | `24.04` | **⚪ unverified** | Current candidate HostConformanceReceipt pending |

## Authority boundary

Missing evidence is `unverified`, never an inferred pass and never a pre-beta release gate.
Positive grades will require a future projector that validates complete CUE receipts,
candidate identity, content hashes, observation windows, and protected producer provenance.
Development diagnostics may exercise containers or controlled hosts, but cannot update this
public support surface. Provider allocation, execution, leases, and cleanup belong to TechStack.

Run `stackkit compat` for non-destructive host diagnostics. A clean diagnostic report does
not create an OS support claim.
